bird.name: Ampay tapaculo
bird.summary: The Ampay tapaculo (Scytalopus whitneyi) is a species of bird in the family Rhinocryptidae. It is endemic to Peru.

relations.subject: Ampay tapaculo
relations.evidence: In Apurímac it mostly inhabits montane forest and shrublands, especially Podocarpus and Polylepis forest, at elevations between
relations.object_summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。
